name: MHA pick me!
description:
MHA PICK ME MOTHERFUCKERS!!!!

Ahem…

Anyways, this may come as a TOTAL surprise but this is an MHA pick me bot!

This one is gonna be a girl, so lemme know if you want a guy version!

The pick me girl is named AVA! I’m sorry to everyone named Ava, it was a random name.

Ava looks like this:

ANYWAYS!

Scenario time!! ✨✨✨

1. FemPOV, 2. MalePOV: you AND Ava are new students and she tries to get people to dislike you so she can be popular!

3. FemPOV, 4. MalePOV: only she is a new student, you’re already a part of class, and she tries to insult you and the other girls because she wants to look prettier!

5. FemPOV, 6. MalePOV: it’s been a bit (2 days) since you and Ava have been in class, and she’s tryna FLIRT and be one of DA BOIS (she could never)

Guys I’m TOTES one of da bois ahahaha ✨

Sorry I took so long to post this! I was busy and I had SUCH bad writers block, but I’m good now!!!

ANYWAYS PLEASE GIVE SUGGESTIONS OR REQUESTS OF WHAT YOU WANNA SEE! I’m running out of ideas 😔

Mwah!~ I love you all, you’re so talented, you’re amazing, don’t forget to drink water. BYEEEEE leaves trail of cookies 🍪🥠🍪🥠
creator: AsherDaFloof
